message:
feat(gateway): Expand WebSocket ring buffer configs and improve reconnect auth

Ring Buffer Configurations (ring-buffer.ts):
- Adds buffer configs for new channel patterns:
  - session:job (1000 capacity, 1hr TTL) - Job lifecycle events
  - session:health (60 capacity, 1min TTL) - Health heartbeats
  - fleet:repos (200 capacity, 10min TTL) - Repository updates
  - fleet:sync (100 capacity, 10min TTL) - Sync progress events
  - fleet:sweep (100 capacity, 10min TTL) - Sweep status events
  - fleet:sync:session (2000 capacity, 1hr TTL) - Sync session logs
  - fleet:sweep:session (2000 capacity, 1hr TTL) - Sweep session logs
  - pipeline:all (100 capacity, 5min TTL) - Pipeline summaries
  - pipeline:run (5000 capacity, 1hr TTL) - High-volume run logs

WebSocket Handler Improvements (handlers.ts):
- Updates heartbeat on ANY valid client message, not just explicit
  heartbeats - improves connection liveness detection
- Reconnect handler now validates channel authorization before
  replaying missed events
- Invalid/unauthorized channels get WS_SUBSCRIPTION_DENIED error
  with specific channel identified
- Only authorized channels are passed to handleReconnect()

These changes support the expanded real-time event system while
maintaining proper access control on reconnection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
